## Title: Fix buffer overflow vulnerability in NR small block encoder

### Summary
The `encodeSmallBlock` function in the NR small block coding module contains a buffer overflow vulnerability due to unchecked array indexing. The function iterates up to `len` times and accesses `nrSmallBlockBasis[i]` without bounds validation. Since the `nrSmallBlockBasis` array contains only 11 elements (indices 0-10), passing a `len` parameter greater than 11 causes an out-of-bounds read, leading to undefined b
